title: Joey Barton Says He Did Not Hurt Someone at a Golf Club
summary: Joey Barton is a former football player. He is in trouble because he is accused of hurting a man at a golf club in Merseyside. The man is Kevin Lynch, who used to be a football manager. Joey Barton says he did not do it. He went to court by video from prison. Another man, Gary O'Grady, is also accused. They were drinking with Kevin Lynch before the problem happened. Kevin Lynch got a bad injury to his eye. Joey Barton will have a trial in September to decide if he is guilty. He played for many football teams like Manchester City. This story is about the law and sports.

a meeting in court to find out if someone is guilty

options: He says he did not do it

He says it was an accident
questions.correct_answer: He says he did not do it

What injury did Kevin Lynch get?
options: A bad injury to his eye
questions.correct_answer: A bad injury to his eye

background_read: Joey Barton is a famous person from sports. He played football for teams like Manchester City. Sometimes, people in sports get into trouble with the law. A golf club is a place for playing golf, but sometimes fights happen there. Courts help decide if someone did something wrong. Trials are important to make sure everyone is treated fairly. This story shows how even famous people must follow the rules.
Article_Structure: WHO: Joey Barton, a former football player, and Gary O'Grady
WHAT: They are accused of hurting Kevin Lynch at a golf club
WHERE: At Huyton and Prescot Golf Club in Merseyside
WHY: To decide if they are guilty in a trial

perspectives.description: The court process to find out if Joey Barton is guilty of hurting someone
